{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus crown
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]]'s [[Ragnarus crown]] contains a [[ruby]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] can command the [[Ragnarus crown]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
